hyperedges.label: Offer Document Generation Pipeline
Authentication & Authorization Middleware Group
Database Schema Migrations
Schema barrel export groups all domain schemas
All lib modules consume env for configuration
Controllers and workers use prisma for DB access
BullMQ async document generation pipeline
Main router aggregates all sub-routers under /api with requireSession guard
All domain controllers perform CRUD via Prisma
All domain types derive from openapi-typescript generated api.ts
Offer domain: Offer, OfferPosition, OfferFlatRate, Customer, Supplier, User, Document, Task
Order domain: Order, OrderPosition, Customer, User, Document, Task
TanStack Router file-based routes under _main layout
Filter UI Components
Input Primitive Components
Dropdown Open/Close Pattern
Data Actions Layer - all domain data modules call api()
React Query hooks wrapping data actions
Offer CRUD flow: list -> item -> modal -> data actions
Customer CRUD flow: list -> item -> modal
Offer product inline editing: modal section -> section item -> product form
Products Page Component Tree
Contracts Page Component Tree
Orders Page Component Tree
Employees Page Component Tree
Modal Pattern - CRUD modals using ModalDialog
Offer Generation Pipeline: Template + Products + Customer -> Document
All Offers for Test AG (Müller Milch)
All Offers for Dignum GmbH (Armin Sammet)
Employee Management UI Components
All offers issued to Dignum GmbH / Armin Sammet
Keepit backup product suite offered by dignum GmbH
